info.title: RWA Backend API
info.description: API documentation for the RWA graduation project - Real World Assets Platform

sources.description: Optional provider subset to sync. Empty means all enabled providers.

dob.description: Date of birth in ISO format

idFrontImg.description: Front-side image URL of identity document

idBackImg.description: Back-side image URL of identity document

selfieImg.description: Selfie image URL for identity verification

reason.description: Reason for rejecting a KYC submission
reason.example: Uploaded documents are blurry and unreadable

totalSupply.description: Total supply of this asset token

isHot.description: Whether this asset is highlighted as hot

transactionId.description: Transaction ID that needs gas speed-up
Transaction ID for gas refund request

content.example: Withdrawal request is still pending after 2 hours.

status.description: New status of the support ticket

snapshotDate.description: Snapshot date/time. Defaults to immediate execution if omitted.

errors.description: Detailed error information by field, domain rule, or external provider.

traceId.description: Request trace id for debugging across services.

BadRequest.description: Malformed request payload or failed domain validation.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication is missing, invalid, revoked, or expired.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not allowed to access or mutate this resource.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded or too many OTP/password attempts.

InternalServerError.description: Unexpected server error or upstream dependency failure.
